caption: The video captures a fashion show taking place in an elegant banquet hall, adorned with chandeliers and a sophisticated ceiling design. A group of models, dressed in traditional attire, walks confidently down a blue carpet runway. The men are wearing various styles of traditional garments, including long tunics and buttoned shirts, predominantly in shades of blue and beige. The audience, seated on either side of the runway, watches attentively as the models showcase their outfits. The atmosphere is formal and celebratory, highlighting the cultural significance of the clothing being displayed. As the models reach the end of the runway, they turn and walk back, maintaining their poise and grace throughout the presentation.
